data.name: ConfirmAccountBody
data.value:
Welcome, {0}!

Please confirm your account by clicking this link:

Confirm LOVI account

data.name: EmailChangingBody
data.value: Your email address on LOVI is about to change from {0} to {1}. If this wasn't you, please contact support.

data.name: ConfirmNewEmailBody
data.value:
Please confirm your new email address by clicking here:

Confirm new Email

data.name: PasswordResetBody
data.value:
Please reset your password by clicking here:

Reset Password

data.name: PasswordChangeBody
data.value: Your account password has been successfully updated. If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

data.name: WelcomeBody
data.value:
Hi {0}!

Your account has been successfully created. welcome to LOVI.

You can now start exploring everything we have to offer.

data.name: EmailChangedBody
data.value: Your email address on LOVI has been changed from {0} to {1}. If this wasn't you, please contact support.

data.name: PasswordResetConfirmedBody
data.value: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now log in with your new password.

data.name: AccountDeletedBody
data.value: Your account has been successfully deleted. Thank you for being with us.
